subcodes.first_line: O thou who art the chief among those endued with mystic knowledge! Thy letter was received, and its contents bore witness to thy recognition of the Incomparable Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سر حلقه اهل عرفان نامه شما واصل و مضمون دلیل بر عرفان حضرت بیچون بود و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant
